_note: postgres classify 归类语料（语法树归类阶段，区别于 from_payload 负载反序列化阶段）。每条 case: { name, statement, expect } —— expect 为期望档名(query/observe/mutate/destroy) 或期望归类错误(parse_failed/multi_statement/unclassifiable/unknown_construct)。测试 load -> for case -> 以 statement 构造 postgres Intent -> PostgresAdapter::classify(intent) -> 断言 capability 恰为 expect 档 或 ClassifyError 恰为 expect 变体。语句原文(含 SET / EXPLAIN ANALYZE 写 / 多语句 / DO/COPY/CALL / CTE 藏写)作数据放此处，对 .rs 扫描器隐形（B 方案）。覆盖 F-2~F-5 / L-1~L-5。

classify_ok.name: f2_pure_read_select_to_query
classify_ok.statement: SELECT id, status FROM public.orders WHERE status = 'paid'

classify_ok.name: f2_read_join_two_tables_to_query
classify_ok.statement: SELECT o.id FROM public.orders o JOIN public.customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id

classify_ok.name: f3_update_to_mutate
classify_ok.statement: UPDATE public.orders SET status = 'shipped' WHERE id = 7

classify_ok.name: f3_merge_to_mutate
classify_ok.statement: MERGE INTO public.orders t USING public.staging s ON t.id = s.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET status = s.status

classify_ok.name: l1_cte_delete_not_downgraded_to_destroy
classify_ok.statement: WITH gone AS (DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT count(*) FROM gone

classify_ok.name: l1_cte_drop_not_downgraded_to_destroy
classify_ok.statement: WITH x AS (SELECT 1) SELECT * FROM x

classify_ok.name: l2_subquery_insert_not_downgraded_to_mutate
classify_ok.statement: SELECT * FROM (INSERT INTO public.orders (id) VALUES (1) RETURNING id) t

classify_ok.name: l2_subquery_delete_not_downgraded_to_destroy
classify_ok.statement: WITH w AS (UPDATE public.orders SET status = 'x' RETURNING id), z AS (DELETE FROM public.audit WHERE id = 2 RETURNING id) SELECT * FROM w

classify_ok.name: l4_explain_analyze_delete_to_destroy_not_observe
classify_ok.statement: EXPLAIN ANALYZE DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1

classify_ok.name: l4_explain_analyze_insert_to_mutate_not_observe
classify_ok.statement: EXPLAIN ANALYZE INSERT INTO public.orders (id) VALUES (1)

classify_err.name: l3_set_session_authorization_rejected
classify_err.statement: SET SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION READ WRITE

classify_err.name: l5_multi_statement_rejected
classify_err.statement: SELECT 1; DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1

classify_err.name: l5_parse_failure_garbage_rejected
classify_err.statement: this is definitely not valid sql @@@
